title: [SV] Check that PAssign, BPAssign don't drive Wire
body:
Add a verifier to check that sv.passign and sv.bpassign don't drive an
sv.wire.  An sv.wire is a net type and can only be driven by sv.assign.

This PR should land after https://github.com/llvm/circt/pull/1627 (and this PR not expected to pass regressions until it does).

This could be differently modeled with modifications to SV types, e.g., to add explicit "net type" and "variable type" or by adding utilities to compute whether something is a net or a variable. However, this is the most expedient approach to preventing regressions where passes generate invalid Verilog related to confusion about `sv.wire`. 😅
